title: China Just Built A Two Brain AI Robot: One Body, Two Minds
summary: China released JAKA Pi, a compact humanoid robot with a dual-brain AI architecture for real-time sensing and control. Vietnam unveiled the Dyno humanoid and VinRobotics VR-H3 for security, home, and industrial applications. NVIDIA released the Isaac GR00T reference design pairing Jetson Thor processors with Unitree H2 robots for researchers.
